item.title: 🔴 Iran Escalation: Largest US Base Hit by Ballistic Missile, 6 Troops Killed
item.description: Al Udeid Air Base in Qatar struck by ballistic missile. Six US troops killed in separate drone strike on Kuwait command center. US embassies under direct attack as Iran retaliates for US-Israeli strikes that killed Ayatollah Khamenei. Conflict widening into Gulf state host nations.

item.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani — No New Developments
item.description: No breaking news in the last 6 hours. Most recent coverage (~2 days old) involved a clash with an Iranian activist over US strikes on Iran.

item.title: AI/ML — No Major Breaking News
item.description: No significant AI/ML developments reported in the last 6 hours.

item.title: Fintech / Moody's — No Major Breaking News
item.description: No significant fintech or Moody's developments reported in the last 6 hours.
